scripts.dev: bun run --filter @helix/server dev & bun run --filter @helix/web dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter @helix/contracts build && bun run --filter @helix/shared-kernel build && bun run --filter @helix/server build && bun run --filter @helix/web build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @helix/server test && bun run --filter @helix/web test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --filter @helix/server test:coverage && node scripts/check-coverage.mjs apps/server/coverage/lcov.info
